change_summary: Upgraded database connection pool library from pgpool v2.1 to v3.0. Changed default pool size from 20 to 10 for memory optimization. Updated query timeout from 5000ms to 2000ms.
Added coupon validation endpoint. Updated cart merge logic. Fixed race condition in session handling.
Updated payment processor SDK to v4.2.0. Added retry logic with exponential backoff. New webhook signature validation.
Migrated session storage to Redis cluster. Updated JWT token expiration from 1h to 15m for security. Added refresh token rotation.
Added real-time inventory subscription via WebSocket. Implemented bulk reservation endpoint. Updated caching strategy for product catalog.
